final:
module RefModule
(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input load,
    input [3:0] data_in,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 4'b0000; // Clear register to 0000
        end else if (load) begin
            q <= data_in; // Load new data
        end else begin
            q <= {q[2:0], 1'b0}; // Shift left
        end
    end

endmodule
